description_long: This lantern features a classic, angular design with a black metal frame and a prominent, steeply pitched roof. The body of the lantern is enclosed with clear glass panels, each bordered by a metal X-brace for structural support and visual interest. At the top, a sturdy, bent metal hook allows the lantern to be hung from a post or ceiling fixture. The surface of the metal is slightly weathered, giving it a matte, aged appearance suitable for outdoor urban environments. The base of the lantern is solid, with small rivets visible along the lower edge, suggesting durability and craftsmanship. The overall style is reminiscent of traditional street or garden lanterns commonly found in parks, sidewalks, or residential entryways.
description: A black metal lantern with a pitched roof, clear glass panels, and a hanging hook, featuring X-brace detailing and a weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the X-brace on the glass panel and the bent hanging hook.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the symmetrical X-brace and the central alignment of the hook.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to view 0, with the X-brace and hook visible from a slightly different perspective.
description_view_3: Direct rear view, mirroring the front, with the X-brace and hook centered.
